name: Consolidated Scorecard Generator
description: Daily (12 PM ET, Mon-Fri): Aggregates fundamental (40%), technical (25%), sentiment (20%), valuation (15%) scores into weighted composite. Ranks all watchlist stocks.

parameters.content:
## Scorecard Generator

Required: postgresApi
Weights: Fund 40%, Tech 25%, Sent 20%, Val 15%

parameters.query: WITH tech AS (SELECT ticker,CASE WHEN signal='bullish' THEN 8 WHEN signal='neutral' THEN 5 ELSE 3 END as ts FROM technical_indicators WHERE indicator_date=CURRENT_DATE AND indicator_name='TREND'),sent AS (SELECT ticker,AVG(sentiment_score) as ss FROM news_articles WHERE published_at>NOW()-INTERVAL '7 days' AND sentiment_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ticker) SELECT w.ticker,w.strategy,t2.company_name,COALESCE(fs.overall_score,5) as fund,COALESCE(tech.ts,5) as tech,COALESCE((sent.ss+1)*5,5) as sent FROM watchlists w JOIN tickers t2 ON w.ticker=t2.ticker LEFT JOIN investment_scores fs ON w.ticker=fs.ticker AND w.strategy=fs.strategy AND fs.score_date=CURRENT_DATE LEFT JOIN tech ON w.ticker=tech.ticker LEFT JOIN sent ON w.ticker=sent.ticker WHERE w.status='active'

INSERT INTO investment_scores (ticker,strategy,score_date,overall_score,fundamental_score,technical_score,sentiment_score,valuation_score,recommendation,created_at) VALUES (?,?,CURRENT_DATE,?,?,?,?,?,?,NOW()) ON CONFLICT (ticker,strategy,score_date) DO UPDATE SET overall_score=EXCLUDED.overall_score,fundamental_score=EXCLUDED.fundamental_score,technical_score=EXCLUDED.technical_score,sentiment_score=EXCLUDED.sentiment_score,valuation_score=EXCLUDED.valuation_score,recommendation=EXCLUDED.recommendation;
